Event: Lagoon Adventure
Event Date: 19/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E84
Summer Heat

Enhancement: 1
Every once in a while, the fighter ignites all enemy fighters within a small radius around. Burning fighters take 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 325000 magical damage and their healing is reduced by 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% for 3 seconds. The fighter also deals physical damage to all burning enemy fighters equal to 60% / 61% / 62% / 63% / 64% / 67% / 70% of their physical armor.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Every once in a while, the fighter ignites all enemy fighters in a large radius around. Burning fighters take 70600 / 100800 / 144000 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 / 400000 magic damage and their healing is reduced by 28% / 29% / 30% / 31% / 33% / 36% / 40% for 4 seconds. The fighter also deals pure damage to all burning enemy fighters equal to 75% / 76% / 77% / 78% / 80% / /85% of their physical armor.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter ignites all enemy fighters. Burning fighters receive 82300 / 117600 / 180000 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 / 450000 magic damage and their healing is reduced by 35% / 36% / 37% / 38% / 40% / 42% / 45% for 5 seconds. Additionally, the fighter deals pure damage to all burning enemy fighters equal to 88% / 89% / 90% / 92% / 94% / 97% / 100% of their physical armor. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce incoming damage.
